title: DEARBAG Set of 2 Glass Diffuser Bottles Set, 150ml Empty Diffuser Bottle for Room Fragrance, Glass Fragrance Bottles Container for Essential Oils, Aromatherapy (Gray)
features: High Quality: These securely packaged matte black glass diffusers (set of 2) are the perfect choice for making your own essential oil diffuser. The diffuser base is sturdy and stable.

Easy to Use: Simply fill the bottle with essential oil or perfume and insert the diffuser wand. The wand will release the scent of the essential oil essence, creating a relaxing atmosphere in the room. You can add or remove as many diffusers as needed. (Diffuser wands are not included.)

Beautiful Decoration: The matte black glass diffusers are a beautiful decorative piece for bedrooms, bathrooms, shops, and more, showcasing their craftsmanship. Even without adding essential oils, you can use the diffuser wands to create a pleasant atmosphere by distributing your favorite scent.

Improve Your Life: By filling the empty glass diffuser bottles with perfume refills, this DIY diffuser wand set can help improve sleep quality, create a peaceful atmosphere, eliminate bathroom odors, and stay energized at the office.

Suitable Applications: These DIY aromatherapy bottles and accessories are suitable for everyday use, home, office, weddings, events, aromatherapy, spas, meditation, and bathrooms. (This product does not include a diffuser stick)
description: Product description Product features: - These glass diffuser bottles have a strong and sturdy base to offer a stable base for your diffuser plate reeds. - By adding fragrance, you can use this Reed diffuser to improve your sleep quality, create a calming atmosphere, remove unpleasant odours in the bathroom. - DIY perfume bottle for daily use, home, office, wedding, events, aromatherapy, spa, meditation, bathroom. Specifications: Material: glass Colour: Matt Black, Gray, Transparent, Brown, Frosted White Bottle Size: 6.8 x 6.8 x 10 cm The volume of the bottle: 150 ml Package Included: 2 x Glass Diffuser Bottles Note: Please check the size chart carefully before making payment. Please allow 0.5-1 inch difference due to manual measurement. (1 inch = 2.54 cm) Due to different computer monitors, the colour of the actual items may differ slightly from the listings. Thank you for your understanding Directions Add essential oils or perfumes to the glass diffuser bottle, insert fragrance sticks and enjoy the leaked fragrance. Safety Warning General safety warning: See more
